# PERF-023 positive: bytes.NewReader allocated per request
lang: go
file: PERF-023-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"io"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Echo(c *gin.Context) {
	body := []byte("ok")
	reader := bytes.NewReader(body)
	_ = reader
	io.Copy(c.Writer, reader)
}
